name: Research Proposal
about: Propose a new research direction or project

labels: research
assignees: ''
---

## Research Proposal

### Title
A concise title for your research proposal

### Abstract
Brief summary (150-200 words) of the research problem and proposed approach

### Research Problem
What specific problem in AI research are you addressing?

### Literature Review
Key related papers and approaches:

- [ ] Paper 1 - Brief description
- [ ] Paper 2 - Brief description
- [ ] Paper 3 - Brief description

### Proposed Methodology
Describe your technical approach:

#### Technical Approach
- **Algorithm**: [ ] New algorithm / [ ] Extension of existing
- **Dataset**: [ ] New dataset / [ ] Existing dataset
- **Evaluation**: [ ] New metrics / [ ] Standard metrics

#### Implementation Plan
- **Phase 1**: Literature review and baseline implementation
- **Phase 2**: Algorithm development and testing
- **Phase 3**: Experimental validation and paper writing

### Expected Contributions
What novel contributions will this research make?

- [ ] Theoretical contribution
- [ ] Empirical contribution
- [ ] Dataset contribution
- [ ] Open-source contribution

### Required Resources
- **Computing**: GPU hours, storage requirements
- **Data**: Dataset access or collection needs
- **Software**: Specific libraries or tools
- **Personnel**: Collaboration needs

### Timeline
| Phase | Duration | Start Date | End Date | Deliverables |
|-------|----------|------------|----------|--------------|
| Phase 1 | 2 months | 2025-05-01 | 2025-07-01 | Baseline results |
| Phase 2 | 3 months | 2025-07-01 | 2025-10-01 | Algorithm implementation |
| Phase 3 | 2 months | 2025-10-01 | 2025-12-01 | Paper submission |

### Risk Assessment
Potential challenges and mitigation strategies:

- **Technical Risk**: [ ] Low / [ ] Medium / [ ] High
  - *Mitigation*: 
- **Data Risk**: [ ] Low / [ ] Medium / [ ] High
  - *Mitigation*: 
- **Timeline Risk**: [ ] Low / [ ] Medium / [ ] High
  - *Mitigation*: 

### Collaboration Opportunities
- **Internal**: Lab members interested in this research
- **External**: Potential collaborators from other institutions
- **Industry**: Industry partners for data or applications

### Publication Targets
- **Primary Venue**: [ ] Conference / [ ] Journal
- **Backup Venues**: Alternative publication options
- **Workshops**: Workshop presentations

### Ethical Considerations
- **Data Privacy**: [ ] Yes / [ ] No
  - *Details*:
- **Bias and Fairness**: [ ] Yes / [ ] No
  - *Details*:
- **Societal Impact**: [ ] Yes / [ ] No
  - *Details*:

### Budget Requirements
| Item | Cost | Justification |
|------|------|--------------|
| Computing Resources | $0 | GPU cluster time |
| Data Collection | $0 | Dataset acquisition |
| Software Licenses | $0 | Commercial tools |
| Travel | $0 | Conference presentations |

### PI Approval
- **Primary Investigator**: [ ] Approved / [ ] Pending
- **Co-PI**: [ ] Approved / [ ] Pending
- **Lab Committee**: [ ] Approved / [ ] Pending

### Checklist
- [ ] Literature review completed
- [ ] Research question clearly defined
- [ ] Methodology outlined
- [ ] Resources identified
- [ ] Timeline established
- [ ] Ethical considerations addressed
- [ ] PI approval obtained
